message:
Expand test coverage: CBOR canonicalization, manifest validation, SSRF prevention, store metadata, and protocol integration

fcp-cbor: Added 500+ lines of tests covering RFC 8949 §4.2.1 map key
sorting edge cases (prefix strings, byte string ordering, empty keys,
cross-type integer-vs-text sorting by encoded bytes), depth limit
boundary conditions at max nesting depth, and additional canonicalization
round-trip vectors.

fcp-manifest: Added 600+ lines of NetworkConstraints validation edge
case tests covering zero-value rejection for connect_timeout_ms,
total_timeout_ms, and max_response_bytes, plus boundary conditions for
dns_max_ips, max_redirects, and SPKI pin format validation.

fcp-sandbox: Added 670+ lines of SSRF prevention tests covering
IPv4-mapped IPv6 bypass attempts (::ffff:127.0.0.1 must be detected as
localhost, ::ffff:10.x.x.x as private), CIDR deny list bypass via
mapped addresses, wildcard hostname matching edge cases (subdomain match
but not bare parent), and IPv4-compatible vs IPv4-mapped address
distinction.

fcp-store: Updated no-mock integration tests to use the new
ObjectSymbolMeta / ObjectTransmissionInfo API — every test that puts
symbols now calls put_object_meta first, symbol data sizes aligned to
the 128-byte symbol_size declared in OTI, and the coverage_health_degraded
test now explicitly constructs a CoverageEvaluation with is_available=true
to test the degraded-but-available path.

fcp-protocol: Added new no_mock_integration.rs test file with real-crypto
roundtrip tests for FCPS/FCPC frame encoding, session handshake, symbol
encryption, and control-plane object serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
